headline: Why Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of enterprise technology company Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) jumped 10% in the afternoon session after analysts raised their price targets on the company, citing increased demand for servers driven by artificial intelligence (AI) workloads.
